themes.reasoning_notes: Instant-speed pump for up to two creatures in combat; temporary +1/+1 and lifelink is classic combat-trick play.
Grants lifelink until end of turn, enabling a burst of life gain if the creatures connect or deal combat damage.
Instant-speed temporary pump on up to two creatures is a clean combat-trick effect; lifelink is rider text, not the main deckbuilding hook.
It can produce a one-shot life swing via temporary lifelink, but it does not reward or repeatedly support a dedicated lifegain plan.
